summary: W863 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while reconciling the W862 concrete-leaves target-ExactAt direct route with the W842 direct-source stable package. From one W839 target homology-zero branch datum, W863 checks direct bounded left calculus through W862 and obtains the bounded derived infinity-category package through W842, removing the separate finite-limit, finite-colimit, pretriangulated, and triangulated arguments from this surface. Product success remains false because concrete W839 branch fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
